semantic.role: Domain service managing in-memory user entities with creation and lookup operations.
responsibilities: Define the User entity interface (id, name, email).
Provide UserService class for in-memory CRUD of User objects.
Generate unique user IDs using random strings.
Expose methods to create new users and retrieve users by ID.
outOfScope: User update or deletion operations (not evident from usage).
invariants: User IDs generated are unique per UserService instance (random).
User list is never persisted across process restarts.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a simple in-memory domain service for user management, suitable for prototyping or isolated testing.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Initial creation of UserService and User interface.

publicSurface.description: Interface describing the shape of a user entity with id, name, and email fields. Used by consumers to type-check user data.
Class providing in-memory user storage, creation (with auto-generated IDs), and retrieval by ID. Consumed by handlers that need user CRUD.
